top_signals.title: Asean Head Warns of Food Security Challenge
top_signals.summary: Asean Secretary- General Kao Kim Hourn says the war in the Middle East is a "wake-up" call for the bloc to work together to ensure energy resilience and food security. He speaks with Haslinda Amin on the sidelines of the Shangri-La Dialogue in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB Consumer Expectations Survey results – April 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Sellers are pulling homes off the market at the fastest pace since 2020
top_signals.summary: Frustrated sellers are pulling their homes off the market at an increasingly high pace, as demand weakens and bidding wars wane.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hidden beneath AI chips, Chinese-made circuit boards raise national security concerns in U.S.
top_signals.summary: With demand booming for printed circuit boards, the U.S. government is trying to boost domestic production to move away from reliance on China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Boris Vujčić: A European perspective on currency and convergence
NBA Commissioner says 2027 launch of NBA Europe remains on track
top_signals.summary: The league has seen record interest in the proposed competition, and the ‌NBA is ‌working closely with FIBA on the project.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
